title: EQ - Two devices on one phone, change EQ on one device has no effect on the second device
scenario: EQ preset changes on one Poly device do not affect EQ settings on a second connected Poly device; each device maintains independent EQ settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android phone.
Connect the first Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) to the phone.
Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [First Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Select a specific EQ preset (e.g., Bass Boost) for the first device.
Connect the second Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager 4320) to the same phone.
Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Second Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
Observe the currently selected EQ preset on the second device.
Change the EQ preset on the second device to a different preset (e.g., Treble Boost).
Switch back to the first device's EQ settings and verify the preset remains unchanged.
expected: Each device maintains independent EQ settings. Changing the EQ preset on one device does not affect the EQ settings on the second device.
